summary: Iteration 77 - Stock Items Dropdown Feature for Purchase Vouchers - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 feature tests verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, no functional impact)

seed_data_creation: Created test vouchers (TEST_StockDropdown_Verify, TEST_CustomItem_Verify) which are now visible in the app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock items dropdown feature fully functional. Custom items (NewTestProduct) now appear in stock overview cards after creation. Paddy stock increased to 469.96 Q after test purchases.

details: Returns 200 status
Returns list of items with name and available_qntl fields
Includes standard items: Paddy, Rice (Usna), Rice (Raw), FRK, Bran, Kunda, Broken, Kanki, Husk
Accepts kms_year and season filter parameters
Stock overview section displays cards for all stock items
Each card shows item name and available quantity (e.g., 'Paddy 461.96 Q')
Positive quantities shown in emerald/green color
Zero quantities shown in gray
data-testid='pv-stock-overview' present
Item Name field is a Select dropdown (not text input)
Dropdown opens on click
Uses shadcn Select component
Dropdown options show item name with available quantity
Format: 'Paddy (461.96 Q)', 'Rice (Usna) (0 Q)', etc.
All 9 standard items visible in dropdown
'+ Other / Custom Item' option at bottom of dropdown
Option highlighted in amber/orange color
Selecting it switches to custom input mode
Text input appears when '+ Other / Custom Item' selected
Input highlighted in amber color
Can enter any custom item name
Stock column shows available quantity for selected stock item
Shows '461.96Q' when Paddy selected
Shows 'New' for custom items
Shows '-' when no item selected
Add Item button visible in Items section
Click adds new item row
New row has its own dropdown (data-testid='pv-item-select-1')
Created voucher with Paddy (stock item)
Party: TEST_StockDropdown_Verify
Items: Paddy(8Q) @ Rs.2600 = Rs.20,800
Success toast: 'Purchase voucher save ho gaya!'
Voucher appears in list with correct values
Created voucher with custom item 'NewTestProduct'
Party: TEST_CustomItem_Verify
Items: NewTestProduct(5Q) @ Rs.1200 = Rs.6,000
Success toast displayed
Custom item now appears in stock overview cards

test_classes: TestPurchaseVoucherWithStockItem (2 tests) - Voucher creation with Paddy, FRK
TestPurchaseVoucherWithCustomItem (2 tests) - Voucher creation with custom items

frontend_test_summary.stock_overview_cards_visible: PASSED - Shows all items with quantities
